# Application Flows for Global Home Services Marketplace (V1 - Manual Assignment)

This document outlines the key application flows and user journeys for the User, Service Provider, and Admin applications for V1 of the global home services marketplace, specifically focusing on the manual service provider assignment process by administrators.

## 1. User Application Flow (V1)

The User Application in V1 provides a streamlined experience for customers to discover and book home services, with the understanding that service provider assignment will be handled by the administration.

### 1.1. User Onboarding & Account Management
![User Onboarding V1](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/VanzrwaeqKe0sV543vlShf/sandbox/67fPcIStOkSUhQHun5MjlH-images_1782274498475_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L2RpYWdyYW1zX3YxL3VzZXJfb25ib2FyZGluZ192MQ.png?__&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=fh2bi5KctYPM35Mo1j1exKxnyCoAdiLBRvenWN2gYpsJoeYnd~WsuM6Dckrud5CsbMHlKii~B2lLn6WhdLqowwf5Pl62coLHKrPP-SK2Hq78zV8x28ZKCmX-9Dkhhk93VkHbCrRjk~m~dYMqHks-oiANYSHoSD1EJroFRVwSzE6~CRtFc37TUXE9~PsJYCj3yDRctyBP7r25v58MXP8gHAeP8pHjfEYR47EVzdEjQE94dwpD8sRNW5ecDNzj91Z-pe-VuZneM7jLxLmei79rD0uMHOpoyr60OfRUrgZe5MKzXQr-A-iBVEA-lHOuGlUS-FtCqkHj0efqLv3GolR8ug__)

## 2. Service Provider Application Flow (V1)

The Service Provider Application in V1 focuses on managing assigned jobs and their schedule, with job assignments coming directly from the admin panel.

### 2.1. Provider Onboarding & Profile Management
![Provider Onboarding V1](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/VanzrwaeqKe0sV543vlShf/sandbox/67fPcIStOkSUhQHun5MjlH-images_1782274498475_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L2RpYWdyYW1zX3YxL3Byb3ZpZGVyX29uYm9hcmRpbmdfdjE.png?&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=dgFsmNvOXnuvtS0gKQSKCqBbEIZFFMlnppAJNI1hvWPmxXufUKDHG7NRnOp6GjIlXQ43awSQkDV~HFd8~94h9OPuyQ9Ynz7twVbLtuTAdVLf~zMuW6ZGjyUarD73~ZIoYn9YnGE24E2SNbfFo56Gqx~aEbahORreTW0nCSIOkV8iVP06R4MGwcyC5tifuvqZyWQ~GEIU2GVfMyzfVyfavnsuMtHWBQ6aEdCLYVDg44HTca37HUdPPuYBi5nn6De8erTw4s4iYMa1WhjhQNlb~ezlIsjr3RzX62F0Q5Jd1XWX5RgpbOxjUHZePptbu1OQuDyfmZN17BVmw9u03C6GPQ__)

## 3. Admin Panel Application Flow (V1)

The Admin Panel in V1 is crucial for managing and manually assigning service providers to bookings, ensuring efficient operation of the marketplace.

### 3.1. Admin Login & Dashboard Overview
![Admin Dashboard V1](https://private-us-east-1.manuscdn.com/sessionFile/VanzrwaeqKe0sV543vlShf/sandbox/67fPcIStOkSUhQHun5MjlH-images_1782274498475_na1fn_L2hvbWUvdWJ1bnR1L2RpYWdyYW1zX3YxL2FkbWluX2Rhc2hib2FyZF92MQ.png?__&Key-Pair-Id=K2HSFNDJXOU9YS&Signature=LAV94dFKXVUfT4AbbSmnFma3AV2djsWvO6mgIrxe3ru~fwgtCWJ-Aftaz-gwz6~w10ZsxehyaVUGjw~OnGt4QauNndWjIsocSgJ73St6Kw10EJxsq5Wi91uiqEIDchJ3ygfkxScVjr3Np03U9G3-om8BbU3r6hafsZYYt0f6WUoIS0KVwNOea9~smefNvsrB1PjFJW02XxrhaXIxPP0WJQU0JFzrkg6z15XuFG-eAsVT-ICoIuuJ4zyPDrDnISL0lrMYn9476T7yPveaiSdNZbBUb-YWeZ~vvoivx1JG5M6epWAL4GENhoqxE4Y3HMmtQZ1dyu47qWNqbbVFxFrs9Q__)
